summary: Jobs Dashboard feature testing completed. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features verified and working correctly. Dashboard displays stats, job cards with application counts, search/sort/filter functionality, applicants modal with status filters, notes modal, and applicant profile view.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed but not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Dashboard correctly calculates application stats per job using MongoDB aggregation
Expiring Soon badge (<7 days) working correctly
Has Notes badge properly shows when recruiter_notes exists
Search filter with debounce (500ms) working well
Sort options (newest, expiring_soon, most_applications, posted_date) all functional
Show Expired toggle correctly includes/excludes expired and archived jobs
Notes modal saves and persists notes correctly with success toast
Applicants modal shows all status filter tabs (All, Pending, Reviewed, Shortlisted, Interviewed, Offered, Rejected)
Applicant profile modal shows email, location, skills, about section
Reactivate button only shows for truly expired jobs (expiry_date < now), not archived jobs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Jobs Dashboard feature fully tested. Endpoints: GET /api/jobs/dashboard (stats, jobs list with application counts), PUT /api/jobs/{job_id}/notes (save recruiter notes), PUT /api/jobs/{job_id}/reactivate (reactivate expired jobs), GET /api/jobs/{job_id}/applicants (get applicants with status filter). Frontend component: JobsDashboard.js with all modals working.

dashboard_loads_at_correct_url.details: Dashboard loads at /jobs-dashboard route for recruiters

stats_bar_displays_correctly.details: Shows Active Jobs (5), Applications This Month (7), Interviews (0), Expired Jobs (1)

job_cards_display_all_info.details: Shows title, location, job_type, salary, posted_date, expiry info, application stats

application_statistics_per_job.details: Shows total_applications, pending, shortlisted, interviewed, offered counts

search_filter_by_title.details: Searching 'Full Stack' correctly filters to 1 matching job

sort_dropdown_options.details: All sort options work: Newest First, Expiring Soon, Most Applications, Posted Date

show_expired_toggle.details: Toggle shows 5 active jobs when off, 6 jobs (including archived) when on

view_applicants_modal.details: Opens modal with applicant list, shows 2 applicants for first job

applicant_status_filter_tabs.details: All status filter tabs present: All, Pending, Reviewed, Shortlisted, Interviewed, Offered, Rejected

view_applicant_profile.details: Profile modal shows applicant name, email, applied date, skills, about section

notes_modal_opens.details: Notes modal opens with textarea and Save Notes button

notes_save_and_persist.details: Notes saved successfully with toast notification, persists on page refresh

has_notes_badge.details: Jobs with notes show 'Has Notes' badge

expiring_soon_badge.details: Jobs expiring in <7 days show 'Expiring Soon' badge

reactivate_button_visibility.details: Reactivate button only shows for truly expired jobs (is_expired=true), not archived jobs
